basic_details.job_title: Balangir District Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Physician/Consultant, MO MBBS Posts
basic_details.post_name: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS
basic_details.short_information: The latest Balangir District Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS posts! Published through the official district notification, this new recruitment drive offers 3 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 21 to 65 years age group and possessing qualifications like MBBS, MD, or Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine can attend the walk-in interview on 12 May 2026. Find all details about the Balangir District new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, walk-in process, and notification PDF here.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE: Minimum Age: 21 years, Maximum Age: 65 years. MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM: Minimum Age: 21 years, Maximum Age: 65 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, MD, Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine
qualification.details: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE: MBBS degree from an institution recognized by Medical Council of India. Valid registration from the Odisha Council of Medical Registration. MD in Medicine/Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine from any recognized University/Institution will be preferred. MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM: MBBS or equivalent degree from Medical College or Medical Institution recognized by Medical Council of India. Valid registration certificate under Odisha Medical Registration rule 1965.

vacancy_details.Post Name: MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.86,116/- pm + Others allowances as per PIP, Rs.57,409/- pm + Others allowances (PM-ABHIM)
salary_details.physician/consultant medicine, nphce: Rs.86,116/- pm + Others allowances as per PIP

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Balangir District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Balangir District Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 12 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the post names announced by Balangir District?
faq.answer: Balangir District has announced vacancies for Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS posts. There are a total of 3 vacancies available for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE post is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years. No age relaxation details are provided.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the MO MBBS post?
faq.answer: The MO MBBS post offers a salary of Rs. 57,409/- per month, along with other allowances as per the PM-ABHIM scheme.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized institution and have valid registration with the Odisha Council of Medical Registration. An MD in Medicine or a Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the MO MBBS post?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the MO MBBS post at UHWC under PM-ABHIM.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Office of CDM&PHO, Balangir. Candidates should report by 11:00 AM on the interview date.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry their application form, original documents, and self-attested copies of all supportive documents, including ID proof and educational certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive by Balangir District.
